strings.tutorial_body:
This mod shows you all possible rewards before you click.

[b]Left panel:[/b] See predicted rewards for each RNG offset. Click a row to set your target.

[b]Hover:[/b] Hover over any tile to preview what clicking it reveals.

[b]Right panel:[/b] Track your locked-in rewards.

This is a pure information tool — it does not modify game mechanics.
strings.error_conflict: Conflict: offset {0} is reserved by {1} plan
strings.legend_costs: Offset costs: Card +6 | Relic +1 | Gold +1 | Potion +0
strings.legend_order: Same click: Gold (1x1) always reveals before card/relic
